Hero.subtitle: Business Psychology Student with a strong passion for Human Resources and Coaching.

AboutTeaser.title: About me
AboutTeaser.body:
As a business psychologist specializing in HR and coaching, I combine analytical thinking with empathy and a deep understanding of people and organizations.

I am dedicated to developing HR strategies that unite efficiency with humanity — fostering motivation, unlocking potential, and driving sustainable change.
highlights: Business psychologist specialized in Human Resources and People Development
Over 4 years of experience in HR management
Strong background in communication, motivation, and organizational psychology

Contact.subTitle: Human Resources, Coaching, Personnel Development, Recruiting, Business Psychology.
Contact.contactText: Use the contact form or feel free to email me directly at
Contact.heroBody: Got a project in mind? I help bring your vision to life. Contact me for a free consultation.
Contact.formSubtitle: Tell me about your project and let's create something special
Contact.faqSubtitle: Here are answers to the most important questions

faqs.q: What does a typical project look like?
faqs.a: After our first call, I prepare a detailed concept and timeline. Then I start implementation and keep you updated on progress.

faqs.q: How long does a project take?
faqs.a: It depends on complexity. A simple logo design takes ~1–2 weeks, while a complete website can take 4–8 weeks.

faqs.q: Do you offer maintenance and support?
faqs.a: Yes! I offer various maintenance and support plans to ensure your project continues to perform well.

faqs.q: Do you work with international clients?
faqs.a: Absolutely! I love working with clients worldwide. Communication can be in German or English.
